prompts.name: Cherry Blossoms
prompts.text: Add cherry blossoms with soft pink petals, delicate branches, and gentle spring atmosphere.

prompts.name: Roses
prompts.text: Add roses with layered petals, rich color, natural leaves, and romantic detail.

prompts.name: Lilies
prompts.text: Add lilies with elegant petals, clean shapes, and refined floral presence.

prompts.name: Sunflowers
prompts.text: Add sunflowers with bright yellow petals, large centers, and cheerful summer warmth.

prompts.name: Lavender
prompts.text: Add lavender with purple flower spikes, soft field texture, and calming color.

prompts.name: Wisteria
prompts.text: Add hanging wisteria blossoms with cascading purple clusters and dreamy garden atmosphere.

prompts.name: Hydrangea
prompts.text: Add hydrangea flowers with clustered petals, soft blue or pink color, and lush garden volume.

prompts.name: Lotus
prompts.text: Add lotus flowers with broad leaves, calm water, and serene spiritual beauty.

prompts.name: Maple Leaves
prompts.text: Add maple leaves with red, orange, or gold seasonal color and graceful shapes.

prompts.name: Ivy
prompts.text: Add ivy climbing walls, stone, or wood with natural growth patterns and soft greenery.

prompts.name: Moss
prompts.text: Add moss covering stones, roots, or old surfaces with soft texture and natural damp atmosphere.

prompts.name: Ferns
prompts.text: Add ferns with delicate fronds, layered greenery, and forest-floor detail.

prompts.name: Bamboo
prompts.text: Add bamboo stalks with vertical rhythm, green leaves, and peaceful natural structure.

prompts.name: Glowing Flora
prompts.text: Add fantasy glowing plants with subtle bioluminescence, soft light, and magical natural detail.

prompts.name: Wildflowers
prompts.text: Add wildflowers with varied colors, natural spacing, and cheerful meadow texture.
